CREATE TABLE employee (EMPLOYEE_ID integer, NAME varchar, START_DATE date);
CREATE TABLE job_history (EMPLOYEE_ID integer, JOB_ID varchar, START_DATE date);
INSERT INTO employee (EMPLOYEE_ID, NAME, START_DATE) VALUES (1, 'Alice', '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO employee (EMPLOYEE_ID, NAME, START_DATE) VALUES (2, 'Bob', '2023-02-01');
INSERT INTO job_history (EMPLOYEE_ID, JOB_ID, START_DATE) VALUES (1, 'HR', '2023-01-05');
INSERT INTO job_history (EMPLOYEE_ID, JOB_ID, START_DATE) VALUES (2, 'DEV', '2023-02-10');
SELECT sprintf_iri('http://demo.openlinksw.com:8890/hr/job_history#%d_%s', EMPLOYEE_ID, cast(START_DATE as varchar)) AS JobLink FROM employee;

SELECT sprintf_iri('http://demo.openlinksw.com:8890/hr/job_history#%d_%s', EMPLOYEE_ID, cast(START_DATE as varchar)) AS JobLink FROM job_history WHERE EMPLOYEE_ID IN (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID FROM employee WHERE NAME LIKE 'A%');

SELECT sprintf_iri('http://demo.openlinksw.com:8890/hr/job_history#%d_%s', e.EMPLOYEE_ID, cast(e.START_DATE as varchar)) AS JobLink FROM employee e JOIN job_history j ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = j.EMPLOYEE_ID;
SELECT sprintf_iri('http://demo.openlinksw.com:8890/hr/job_history#%d_%s', EMPLOYEE_ID, REPLACE(cast(START_DATE as varchar), '-', '/')) AS JobLink FROM job_history WHERE START_DATE > '2023-01-01';

SELECT sprintf_iri('http://demo.openlinksw.com:8890/hr/job_history#%d_%s', EMPLOYEE_ID, cast(START_DATE as varchar)) AS JobLink FROM (SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID, MAX(START_DATE) as START_DATE FROM job_history GROUP BY EMPLOYEE_ID) AS LatestJobs;
